title: Hands Across Time
alt_text: Two elderly hands clasped, connecting across decades and cultures in rural Tanzania
description: A Tanzanian woman who worked for the photographer's grandfather clasps hands with his mother, reunited after 75 years at the family's former coffee farm.

title: The Trees He Planted
alt_text: Cathedral-like corridor of towering trees lining a red dirt road in Tanzanian highlands
description: Trees planted 80+ years ago by the photographer's grandfather against local superstition. He lived to 104. They form a cathedral canopy on the family's former coffee farm in Tanzania.

title: Contemplation
alt_text: Black and white profile portrait of elderly woman, wind in her hair, contemplative
medium: Digital photograph, B&W, archival pigment print
description: Profile of the photographer's mother, eight decades after leaving Tanzania as a child, standing among the trees her father planted.

title: Mother, Returning
alt_text: B&W portrait of elderly German woman looking over her shoulder with warm smile in Tanzania
medium: Digital photograph, B&W, archival pigment print
description: The photographer's mother returns to Tanzania for the first time since childhood. She was five when the British expelled her German family during World War II.

title: Walking Back
alt_text: Two women walking down a red dirt road beneath towering trees toward an old house
description: The photographer's mother and sister walk toward the house where the family lived before the war. Towering trees planted by the grandfather line the path home.

title: Urban Dance, Buenos Aires
alt_text: Dancer in motion on Buenos Aires streets, dramatic B&W with strong shadows
medium: Digital photograph, B&W, archival pigment print
description: Street performer mid-dance in Buenos Aires. Motion blur and deep shadows create rhythm in still image form. Part of a series documenting the city's street culture.

title: Silent Geometry
alt_text: Aerial view of sand dunes in stark B&W, abstract geometric patterns of light and shadow
medium: Digital photograph, drone aerial, B&W, archival pigment print
description: Aerial desert dunes reduced to pure geometry. The interplay of wind, sand, and light rendered in black and white from above.

title: Sculptural Dunes
alt_text: Aerial panoramic of sand dunes with dramatic sculptural forms, deep contrast B&W
medium: Digital photograph, drone aerial, B&W, archival pigment print
description: Desert dunes sculpted by wind into monumental forms, captured from above in panoramic black and white. Combined from multiple photographs using advanced stitching.

title: Cavernous Symmetry
alt_text: Architectural interior with dramatic symmetrical arches in deep B&W
medium: Digital photograph, panoramic stitch, B&W, archival pigment print
description: Monumental architectural symmetry captured in deep black and white. Ultra-wide panoramic created by combining multiple photographs using advanced stitching and compositing.

title: Yellow Cadillac, Havana
alt_text: Classic yellow Cadillac on sunlit Havana street with weathered colonial buildings
description: A golden Cadillac against Havana's weathered colonial backdrop. Frozen in time, luminous in decay. From a series documenting Cuba's living time capsule.
